summary_en: 100,000 shares at ¥540/share (¥54.0M total) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-18. Part of broader ¥200M program authorizing up to 350,000 shares (2.93% S/O) through 2026-09-30. Cumulative acquisitions to date: 139,800 shares (¥73.49M).
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Kobayashi Yoko filed notice on 2026-05-15 of a block treasury share acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading). The company will place a buy order for 100,000 common shares at ¥540 per share (¥54.0M total) on 2026-05-18 at 08:45 JST. This block execution is part of a broader buyback program authorized by the board on 2026-03-26 permitting acquisition of up to 350,000 shares (2.93% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥200M through 2026-09-30, using both regular market purchases and ToSTNeT-3 transactions. As of the filing date, the company had already acquired 139,800 shares for ¥73.49M under this authorization. The results of the single 100,000-share block will be published after market close on 2026-05-18.
